signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live AERO short. It is at fresh peak P&L, has no giveback pressure, and the fade thesis is still intact.
BTC is constructive, but the active veto keeps benchmark exposure in watch mode rather than action mode.
ETH has mild bullish tone, but not enough edge to justify fresh risk under the event brake.
SOL remains too mixed to justify action while veto is active.
LIT lacks enough clean edge to justify action here.
SPX has some constructive bias, but not enough structural edge to justify a trade under veto.
REZ has improving squeeze-long traits, but the event brake keeps it in watch mode rather than buy mode.
MAVIA remains one of the clearest bearish fades because funding is extremely positive, crowding is high, and the market quality is still weak.
FOGO remains the cleanest bearish continuation because both price and mechanics continue to lean decisively negative.
DASH remains a decent watch-only long, but veto keeps it out of the buy bucket for now.
